label: Market Trades
description: Real-time market trade tape and own trade history for the selected instrument.

0.1.note: — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx.

0.4.note: — zero any types or @ts-ignore in widget file (Record<string,unknown> cast for useLiveFeed is intentional).

0.6.note: — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders loading spinner when isLoading=true.

0.7.note: — isEmpty={trades.length === 0} and emptyMessage='No trades yet' correctly wired to LiveFeedWidget.

0.8.note: — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders error message when error is non-null.

0.9.note: — no dead code or commented-out blocks.

l0.notes: 0.1 PASS — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all grid widgets via widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 PASS — requiredEntitlements: ['execution-basic','execution-full']. 0.3 PASS — availableOn: ['terminal']. 0.4 PASS — zero any types or @ts-ignore in widget file (Record<string,unknown> cast for useLiveFeed is intentional). 0.5 PASS — no lib/mocks imports. 0.6 PASS — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders loading spinner when isLoading=true. 0.7 PASS — isEmpty={trades.length === 0} and emptyMessage='No trades yet' correctly wired to LiveFeedWidget. 0.8 PASS — isLoading/error now available from TerminalData context; widget renders error message when error is non-null. 0.9 PASS — no dead code or commented-out blocks.

1.1.note: — data via useTerminalData() only; recentTrades and ownTrades sourced from context.

1.3.note: — market trades are instrument-level market data (not filtered by org/client); feed shows all public trades for the selected instrument.

1.5.note: — strategy filter does not affect the market trade tape.

1.6.note: — live feed widget; empty scope = all market trades visible (correct).

1.7.note: — no reference data; deterministic mock generators live in lib/mocks/generators (correct location, not imported by widget).

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

findings: Widget is cleanly structured using LiveFeedWidget base. isEmpty + emptyMessage correctly wired (0.7 PASS).
useLiveFeed type cast (as Array<Record<string,unknown>>) is intentional to match context's opaque trade shape; not a type safety issue.
L0 0.6 and 0.8 are context-blocked — not fixable within widget file alone.
Tab switch between 'All' and 'Own Trades' is functional; allTrades correctly switches source array.
key={i} on trade rows is acceptable for a live-prepend feed (no stable id exposed via Record<string,unknown> shape).
